fixtures.name: bird base
fixtures.executor_readability_notes: Square boundary, diagonals, center, and midpoint creases provide visible landmarks for human-hand executor steps.

fixtures.name: frog base
fixtures.executor_readability_notes: Square boundary and radial crease structure expose corners, center, and edge regions for followable action steps.

fixtures.name: waterbomb base
fixtures.executor_readability_notes: Waterbomb diagonals and center intersection provide stable landmark language for setup, anchor, and crease actions.

fixtures.name: kite base

fixtures.name: fish base
fixtures.executor_readability_notes: Fish base edges and midpoint references are visible enough for executor profile checks and alignment targets.
